name: NORTH EUROPEAN OIL ROYALTY TRUST
summary: North European Oil Royalty Trust (NRT) is a passive grantor trust that holds overriding royalty rights covering gas and oil production in concessions and leases in Germany. It collects royalties on gas well gas, oil well gas, crude oil, condensate, and sulfur from ExxonMobil and Royal Dutch/Shell Group subsidiaries, then distributes net income quarterly to unit owners after expenses.
